moqui.math.ParameterDef.description: Cycle time in milliseconds for the test PLC
Program profile name loaded on the test PLC
Speed setpoint in rpm for the test drive
Torque limit percentage for the test drive
Gateway operating mode for UI and gateway tests
Polling interval in milliseconds for the test gateway
Heartbeat interval in milliseconds for the test device group

moqui.device.Device.description: Minimal test control cell grouping one PLC, one drive and one gateway
Minimal test PLC for SimpleScreens and telemetry scenarios
Minimal test drive for SimpleScreens and telemetry scenarios
Minimal test edge gateway for SimpleScreens and telemetry scenarios

moqui.device.DeviceGroupMember.description: PLC member for the minimal test cell
Drive member for the minimal test cell
Gateway member for the minimal test cell

mantle.work.effort.WorkEffort.description: Synthetic work effort used to attach telemetry measurements to test-cell-group-1
Synthetic work effort used to attach telemetry measurements to test-plc-1
Synthetic work effort used to attach telemetry measurements to test-drive-1
Synthetic work effort used to attach telemetry measurements to test-gateway-1

moqui.device.DeviceConfig.description: Factory defaults for the minimal test device group
Factory defaults for the minimal test gateway

moqui.device.DeviceRuleSet.description: Minimal factory-default rule set for the test cell group

moqui.device.DeviceRule.description: Apply group-level factory defaults to the test cell
Apply gateway factory defaults inside the test cell

moqui.math.ParameterDef.description: Model or runtime artifact name used by AI/HPC serving or training profiles
Numeric precision profile such as fp32, tf32, fp16, bf16, int8
Maximum accelerator power limit in watts
GPU multi-instance mode flag or profile name
Tensor-parallel degree for distributed model execution
Embedding vector dimensionality for vector search and RAG pipelines
Vector similarity metric, for example cosine, dot_product, or l2
HNSW graph out-degree parameter for vector indexing
HNSW ef_search parameter for query-time vector search
Maximum target latency in milliseconds for inference serving

moqui.device.Device.description: Example AI/HPC GPU cluster root device for training, inference, vector search and RAG tests

moqui.device.DeviceConfig.description: Per-GPU training profile for H100 accelerators

moqui.device.DeviceRuleSet.description: Example multi-device AI/HPC production cycle scoped to AIHPCCluster01

moqui.device.DeviceRule.ruleName: Apply H100 BF16 training profile to GPU 0
Apply H100 BF16 training profile to GPU 1

moqui.math.MathModelDef.description: Small synthetic model definition used only to exercise DeviceMathModel binding on AI/HPC devices

moqui.math.MathModel.description: Synthetic production model instance for AI/HPC device binding tests

moqui.device.DeviceMathModel.description: Model serving runtime executes the smoke inference model
Cluster-level binding for monitoring the synthetic model deployment

moqui.device.DeviceConnection.description: Mock connection for AI/HPC GPU server telemetry

moqui.device.DeviceRequest.description: Mock read request for GPU power and serving latency parameters
